title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF LINUGOS, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS ORIENTAL, TO "MAGSAYSAY."

chunks.text:
H. No. 3871 / 53 OG No. 15, 4778 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1653, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF LINUGOS, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS ORIENTAL, TO "MAGSAYSAY."

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Linugos, Province of Misamis Oriental, is hereby changed to "Magsaysay."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
